company_description: Trellix is a cybersecurity company delivering an AI-powered, open security platform spanning endpoint, email, network, data, and cloud security with integrated threat detection and response capabilities.

products.name: Trellix Security Platform
products.description: An open, AI-powered security platform that integrates endpoint, email, network, data, and cloud security controls into a single console for correlated detection and response. LEARN AI

products.name: Trellix Endpoint Security
products.description: A unified endpoint security agent providing attack surface reduction, protection, detection, forensics, and remediation across hybrid environments.

products.name: Trellix EDR with Forensics
products.description: Endpoint detection and response solution with integrated forensics capabilities for investigating and remediating advanced threats.

products.name: Trellix Endpoint Forensics
products.description: Provides deep forensic investigation capabilities at the endpoint level to analyze and reconstruct security incidents.

products.name: Trellix Application and Change Control
products.description: Controls which applications can run on endpoints and monitors unauthorized changes to protect against malware and insider threats.

products.name: Trellix Mobile Security
products.description: Provides threat detection and protection for mobile devices across iOS and Android platforms.

products.name: Trellix ePolicy Orchestrator (ePO)
products.description: Centralized security management platform for deploying, managing, and reporting on Trellix endpoint and security products across an enterprise.

products.name: Trellix Data Loss Prevention
products.description: Monitors and controls data movement across endpoints, networks, and cloud to prevent unauthorized data exfiltration.

products.name: Trellix Data Encryption
products.description: Provides full-disk, file, and removable media encryption to protect sensitive data at rest on endpoints and storage devices.

products.name: Trellix Database Security
products.description: Monitors and protects databases from unauthorized access, SQL injection, and insider threats with real-time activity monitoring.

products.name: Trellix Network Security
products.description: Network detection and response solution that identifies and blocks advanced threats traversing the network using behavioral analysis.

products.name: Trellix Network Forensics
products.description: Captures and analyzes full network packet data to support forensic investigation of network-based security incidents.

products.name: Trellix Intrusion Prevention System
products.description: Network-based intrusion prevention system that detects and blocks known and zero-day exploits in real time.

products.name: Trellix Insights
products.description: Provides prioritized threat intelligence and risk scoring to help security teams focus on the most relevant threats to their environment. LEARN AI

products.name: Trellix SecondSight
products.description: Delivers visibility into security posture and risk exposure across the enterprise to support executive and operational decision-making.

products.name: Trellix Threat Intelligence Exchange
products.description: Enables real-time sharing of threat intelligence between Trellix products and third-party security tools to accelerate threat detection and response.

products.name: Trellix Advanced Threat Landscape Analysis System (ATLAS)
products.description: Aggregates and analyzes global threat telemetry to provide contextual intelligence on the evolving advanced threat landscape.

products.name: Trellix Global Threat Intelligence
products.description: Cloud-based threat intelligence feed that provides reputation data on files, IPs, URLs, and domains to enhance security product efficacy.

products.name: Trellix Private Global Threat Intelligence
products.description: An on-premises version of Trellix's global threat intelligence service for organizations with air-gapped or high-privacy requirements.

products.name: Trellix Intelligence as a Service
products.description: Subscription-based threat intelligence service delivering curated, actionable intelligence reports and feeds to security teams.

products.name: Trellix Email Security
products.description: Protects organizations from phishing, malware, business email compromise, and other email-borne threats using advanced detection techniques.

products.name: Trellix Collaboration Security
products.description: Extends threat protection to collaboration platforms such as Microsoft Teams and SharePoint to detect malicious content and links.

products.name: Trellix Security Operations Platform (XDR)
products.description: Extended detection and response platform that correlates telemetry across endpoint, network, email, and cloud to accelerate threat investigation and response. LEARN AI

products.name: Trellix Helix
products.description: Cloud-native security operations platform providing SIEM, SOAR, and threat intelligence integration for unified security operations.

products.name: Trellix Wise
products.description: Purpose-built generative and predictive AI engine embedded in the Trellix platform to power detections, guided investigations, and threat summarization. CREATE AI / LEARN AI

products.name: Trellix Cloud Security
products.description: Provides visibility and threat protection across multi-cloud environments including AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

products.name: Trellix Malware Analysis
products.description: Dynamic and static malware analysis sandbox that detonates suspicious files and URLs to identify malicious behavior.

products.name: Trellix Detection as a Service
products.description: Cloud-based file and URL detonation service that provides on-demand malware analysis results via API integration.

products.name: Trellix Managed Detection and Response (MDR)
products.description: Fully managed 24/7 threat detection and response service delivered by Trellix security experts on behalf of customers.

products.name: Trellix Education Services
products.description: Trellix's official training program offering instructor-led, eLearning, and hands-on lab courses for Trellix product configuration, management, and security best practices.

competitive_products.competitive_context: CrowdStrike Falcon competes directly with Trellix Endpoint Security and EDR as a cloud-native endpoint protection and XDR platform.
Cortex XDR competes with Trellix's XDR and endpoint security portfolio for enterprise threat detection and response.
Microsoft Defender for Endpoint competes with Trellix Endpoint Security across enterprise endpoint protection and EDR.
Symantec Endpoint Security competes with Trellix across endpoint, DLP, and email security product lines.
Proofpoint competes with Trellix Email Security for enterprise email threat protection and anti-phishing.
Forcepoint DLP competes with Trellix Data Loss Prevention for enterprise data protection and insider threat management.
SentinelOne Singularity competes with Trellix's endpoint and XDR platform using autonomous AI-driven detection.
Splunk SIEM competes with Trellix Helix for security operations, log management, and threat correlation.

partnership_signals.ilt_vilt: Instructor-led and eLearning courses offered through Trellix Education Services

page_contents.atp_page: Education Services | Trellix Take a Product Tour Request a Demo Cybersecurity Assessment Contact Us Education Services A broad training portfolio maximizes the benefit and ROI from your solutions. Product Training To gain maximum value from your solutions, you need expertly trained staff to configure and manage your solutions more efficiently, and optimally safeguard your critical data. You also need your staff on-site, doing their job. Now you can have both. We offer a wide range of hands-on product training courses to help you design, set up, configure, and manage your solutions. Our courses help you make the most of your product investment. Browse our public instructor-led courses for scheduled offerings. Browse our selection of eLearning courses, available online at any time. To schedule a private course for your organization or to inquire about a custom course, please contact us . Explore and Register for Training Security Training Get comprehensive and focused in-person classroom training. Held in private classes at your location, our fully immersive training is led by our experienced security instructors and gives you the opportunity to build best practices for implementing a cybersecurity strategy. Gain the skills you need to proactively defend against the latest security threats. Our comprehensive security training from top industry experts helps your IT professionals gain proficiency in best practices to implement your security strategy and better respond to incidents. Our security courses provide training to help security professionals build secure software and applications, assess vulnerabilities to defend against hacker attacks, and gain critical computer forensics skills to better respond to incidents. Taught by network security experts, our security training features interactive demonstrations and hands-on lab exercises. These instructor-led courses are offered in private classrooms only. To schedule please contact us . Courses IT Risk Strategy - Measure and Treat IT Risk Across Your Enterprise. Application Security Training - Courses include: Attacking Web Applications, Attacking Android and iOS, Building Secure Software, Writing Secure Code: Java. Infrastructure Security Training - Courses include: Beginning Assessment & Penetration Testing, Advanced Assessment and Penetration Testing, Attacking Wireless Technologies, Attacking Firmware, Industrial Control Security, Attacking ICS and IoT. Forensics and Incident Response - Courses include:

page_contents.partner_portal_page:
Partners | Trellix Take a Product Tour Request a Demo Cybersecurity Assessment Contact Us Trellix Partners Explore our NEW Xtend Global Partner Program Become a Partner Trellix Partner Portal Xtend Partner Program Our partnership advances your security business with a new approach to security that is fast enough to keep up with dynamic threats and intelligent enough to learn from them. Partnering with Trellix extends your customer relationships by developing trust, applying security expertise, and customizing your security offerings to defend against the biggest cyber threats. Trellix Partner Portal Login OEM & Embedded Alliance Build security directly into your products Deliver robust protection, by embedding into Trellix solutions, to serve customers with the unique advantage of purpose-built security directly into your products. Learn More Partner Delivered Services Best-in-class security services Get the help you need whether it is deploying solutions, hardening your defenses, managing your environment, or transforming your business. Learn More Become a Partner Partner with Trellix to deliver best-in-class, optimized security solutions to your customers. Trellix partners have the inside track on trending security issues, technologies, and products. Become a Partner Security Advisors Provide security expertise delivered through a sophisticated range of efficient cybersecurity services to ensure customers can rise to any security challenge and become cyber-resilient while mitigating risk. Marketplace Partners Deliver emerging, digitally scalable buying motions based on simplicity, flexibility, and minimum time to value. Technology Alliance Program The Technology Alliance Program (TAP) brings together innovative technology partners to deliver scalable, seamless integrations with the Trellix AI-powered security platform. Guided by a customer-first approach, we focus on extending protection, simplifying complex environments, and driving measurable impact where it matters most. Ready to build with Trellix?
